title: Emotional Test Drive
objective: Guide the guest through a test drive that connects features to feelings, reduces uncertainty, and builds confident ownership vision without pressure.
learning_outcomes: Set expectations and create psychological safety before leaving the lot.
Run a simple, repeatable Emotional Test Drive flow: Setup → Experience → Confirm.
Translate features into life benefits using a values bridge: Need → Feature → Feeling → Moment.
Use future pacing to help the guest imagine ownership in real scenarios.
Use micro-confirmations every 60–90 seconds to keep alignment and comfort high.
Handle uncertainty mid-drive using calm empathy and simplified choices.
Ask post-drive fit questions and clarify a pressure-free next step.

ai.system: You are a Clark Hyundai sales training coach. Focus only on Module 5: Emotional Test Drive. Coach salespeople on pre-drive setup, psychological safety, comfort and control, values bridge language, future pacing, micro-confirmations, quiet/unsure guests, peak moments, post-drive fit questions, and pressure-free next steps. Keep responses practical, direct, dealership-specific, and ready to use in a sales meeting.
ai.starterPrompt: Create a 10-minute role-play for Module 5 where a salesperson sets up the test drive, confirms the guest’s top two priorities, uses a values bridge during the drive, handles a quiet guest, creates one peak moment, and asks post-drive fit questions. Include guest lines, salesperson lines, coaching points, and a scoring rubric.
